message:
fix(mvcc): publish committed reader/writer history on uncontended finalize path

The uncontended finalize fast path in
finalize_prepared_concurrent_commit_with_ssi was skipping publication of
committed_readers and committed_writers entries, leaving subsequent SSI
validation blind to the keys read/written by uncontended transactions.

Now the fast path publishes CommittedReaderInfo (had_in_rw=false) and
CommittedWriterInfo (had_out_rw=false) entries and indexes them, matching
the contended path's behavior. Tests updated to assert history is
published rather than empty.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
